page: Vultr vcg-l40s-64c-750g-192vram is a Cloud GPU family server configured with 64 Intel x86_64 vCPUs and 64 physical cores. The CPU architecture operates with one thread per core under a shared allocation model. The system features 750.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 11.72 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of four NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 192 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 2600 GB NVMe SSD. The server also includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The shared CPU allocation model represents a potential tradeoff for workloads requiring sustained, exclusive CPU execution, though the massive GPU and system memory resources offset this for accelerator-heavy tasks. This hardware configuration is designed for GPU-intensive workloads, including large language model inference, deep learning training, and complex data science jobs.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-64c-750g-192vram is a GPU-accelerated server designed for resource-intensive computational tasks. It features 64 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with 64 physical cores operating on a shared allocation model with one thread per core. The system is equipped with 750.0 GB of system memory, yielding 11.72 GB per core, and a 2600 GB NVMe SSD for local storage. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA L40S GPUs from the Ada Lovelace family, providing a total of 192 GB of VRAM. While the shared CPU allocation is a notable tradeoff for continuous CPU-bound tasks, the high density of GPU memory and system RAM makes this configuration suitable for large-scale AI inference, deep learning, and data-heavy parallel processing workloads.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-64c-750g-192vram is a Cloud GPU server configured with 64 Intel x86_64 vCPUs, 750 GB of system memory, a 2600 GB local NVMe SSD, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs delivering 192 GB of total VRAM.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-64c-750g-192vram is a Cloud GPU server with 64 Intel vCPUs, 750 GB RAM, a 2600 GB NVMe SSD, and four NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 192 GB VRAM.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring four NVIDIA L40S GPUs, 750 GB of system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs with 192 GB total VRAM
64 Intel x86_64 vCPUs with a shared allocation model
750.0 GB of system memory providing 11.72 GB per core
2600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
